format:
(BOOLEAN) Success *
(UINT32) Version
(UINT32) Checksum
(STRING) Version check stat string
(UINT32) Cookie
(UINT32) The latest version code for this product
remarks_html: • Success is TRUE if successful, FALSE otherwise. If this is FALSE, the next UINT32 is the provided cookie, following which the message ends. Do not mistake this value for a UINT8, it is actually a UINT32.
